ボイパ対決だとわかってリアクションとってみよう選手権！！

snippet.title: Seccom Masada VS Wicked-Deceased-Soul H ボイパ対決 Bad Apple!!
snippet.description:
初めてボイパ対決作った. 1日で作られた. どうですか？^^'
My very first full Vocal Percussion Battle. Made in just 1 day (for the most part), more like just a test than an actual serious video. I have another project in the making that i've been working on (and delaying...) for a couple of months now, this is just a quick in-between video i made to put something up. Either way, Hope you like it...
